name: AdGuardHome
description: Network-wide ads & trackers blocking DNS server
readme_summary: AdGuard Home is an open-source, network-wide DNS server designed to block ads and trackers across all devices on a home network. It functions by intercepting DNS requests and redirecting malicious domains to a null route, thereby preventing connections to unwanted servers without requiring client-side software.
key_features: Blocks ads and tracking without client-side software
Supports DNS-over-HTTPS, DNS-over-TLS, DNS-over-QUIC, and DNSCrypt
Automated installation scripts for various OS
primary_use_case: To provide a network-wide solution for blocking advertisements and tracking on all connected devices by acting as a custom DNS server.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, perched atop a network router, wearing a monocle and holding a magnifying glass. The owl is meticulously examining streams of digital data flowing from various devices (represented by small icons like a phone, laptop, smart TV) towards the internet. The owl's gaze filters out 'ad' and 'tracker' icons, which are depicted as small, mischievous imps, while allowing 'safe browsing' icons to pass through. The background is a stylized, clean digital landscape with subtle glowing lines representing network connections. The AdGuard Home logo is subtly integrated into the owl's perch. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, friendly aesthetic and a bright, inviting color palette.

name: webclaw
description: Fast, local-first web content extraction for LLMs. Scrape, crawl, extract structured data — all from Rust. CLI, REST API, and MCP server.
readme_summary: Webclaw is a high-performance web scraping tool written in Rust, designed for AI agents. It efficiently extracts structured data from web pages, optimizing content for LLM consumption by reducing token count and removing unnecessary elements, all without requiring a headless browser.
key_features: Optimized output for LLMs (67% fewer tokens)
CLI, REST API, and MCP server interfaces
Handles common scraping challenges like 403 Forbidden errors
primary_use_case: To provide AI agents with clean, structured, and token-efficient web content extracted directly from URLs, bypassing common scraping obstacles.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, minimalist scene depicting a digital librarian character meticulously sifting through a chaotic pile of raw, unorganized web pages (represented as messy scrolls or data streams). The librarian uses a specialized, glowing magnifying glass labeled 'webclaw' to instantly extract only the essential, clean text and key information (represented as neatly organized, glowing data blocks or elegant book pages). The background shows a subtle, abstract representation of the internet, with the 'webclaw' tool acting as a precise filter, transforming noisy input into valuable, structured output for an AI entity waiting patiently in the foreground. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a vibrant, tech-focused color palette.

name: netscanner
description: Terminal Network scanner & diagnostic tool with modern TUI
readme_summary: Netscanner is a Rust-based terminal network scanner and diagnostic tool that provides a modern TUI for analyzing network interfaces, scanning WiFi networks, and performing packet dumping and port scanning. It allows users to switch active interfaces, monitor WiFi signal strength, ping IPv4 CIDRs, and filter packet logs.
primary_use_case: Network scanning and diagnostics from the terminal with a modern TUI.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital cartographer standing at a crossroads, holding a glowing magnifying glass over a map of interconnected glowing nodes representing a network. The magnifying glass reveals detailed information about each node, such as its signal strength (visualized as radiating waves) and open pathways (glowing ports). Small, subtle UI elements with network data and charts float around the cartographer. The repository name 'netscanner' is subtly etched onto the cartographer's compass. The scene is set in a dimly lit, futuristic control room with a dark, tech-inspired color palette and glowing blue and green accents. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and intuitive representation of network data.

name: inksight
readme_summary: InkSight is a system that converts photos of handwritten text into editable digital ink. It uses a Vision Transformer and mT5 architecture to process diverse handwriting styles and backgrounds, supporting both word-level and full-page conversion for practical digitization.
primary_use_case: Digitizing physical handwritten notes into searchable and editable digital formats.
cover_image_prompt: A magical quill pen, glowing with digital energy, is shown hovering over a crumpled photograph of handwritten notes. As the quill touches the photo, the handwritten ink transforms into clean, flowing lines of digital light that form editable text on a nearby tablet screen. The background is a softly lit study, with subtle UI elements and glowing data streams flowing from the photo to the tablet. The scene emphasizes the transformation from a physical artifact to a digital, usable format. Rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of warm parchment tones contrasted with vibrant digital blues and purples.

name: awesome-bash
description: A curated list of delightful Bash scripts and resources.
readme_summary: Awesome Bash is a curated list of delightful Bash scripts and resources, aimed at enhancing command-line productivity, customization, and development. It serves as a comprehensive guide to learning and utilizing Bash effectively.
key_features: Curated list of Bash scripts and resources
Covers command-line productivity, customization, data handling, development tools, and more
Includes books, guides, FAQs, and best practices for Bash scripting
Links to related awesome lists for shell environments and tools
primary_use_case: To provide a comprehensive and curated collection of resources for learning, using, and mastering the Bash shell and its scripting capabilities.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian meticulously organizing a vast, magical library filled with glowing scrolls and ancient tomes, each representing a different Bash script or command. The librarian is pointing to a specific, brightly lit scroll labeled 'Bash Productivity', which is emitting helpful icons like gears and speed lines. In the background, subtle digital streams of code flow like rivers, connecting different sections of the library. The overall mood is one of organized knowledge and discovery, with warm, inviting lighting. The art style should be a detailed digital painting with a touch of fantasy, emphasizing clarity and wonder.
